hero.name: i'm cristian.
hero.body1: developer and designer with real experience.
hero.personal1: every site is a unique project.

marquee.items: restaurants · hotels · shops · services · real estate · coaches · freelancers · e-commerce · local business

services.eyebrow: // i work with any type of business

problems.body: if you don't have a proper website, they're booking with someone else.
problems.bodyStrong: no excuses — you need to be findable
problems.card1Body: customers search on google. if you're not there, you don't exist.
problems.card2Title: customers don't understand what you do
problems.card2Body: outdated site, confusing info, bad photos. a confused customer doesn't book.
problems.card3Body: the customer has to hunt for your number. every friction point is a lost booking.

solutions.title1: a website that works for you.
solutions.item1Body: every site is designed from scratch for your business. no cookie-cutter templates that look like your competitor's.
solutions.item2Body: contact forms, whatsapp, online bookings. your customer doesn't have to search for anything.
solutions.item3Body: 70% of your customers search from their phone. your site will be fast, clean, and easy to use.

process.step1Body: tell me about your business in 5 minutes. i'll ask the right questions.
process.step2Body: see the design before you decide. don't like it? no problem at all.
process.step3Body: i build everything, set up contacts and forms. you approve. it's online and working.

projects.desc1: trilingual website for boat rental with integrated booking calendar.
projects.desc2: elegant website for luxury b&b with direct booking and immersive gallery.
projects.desc3: complete website for vacation rental with clean design and direct contacts.

pricing.subtitle: everything included.
pricing.tagline: you only pay if you love it.

faq.a1: flat rate: $550 for a complete custom website. no deposit: you only pay when the site is done and you're happy with it.
faq.a2: the mockup arrives in 48 hours. once approved, your site is live within days.
faq.q3: does this work for my business?
faq.a3: if you run a restaurant, shop, studio, or any local business — yes. send me a message and we'll figure it out together.

contact.formError: Error, try again or message me on WhatsApp.
